title: SAPMarkUpPullConfig
description:
SAPMarkUpPullConfig: Configurations specific for an Adapter Action (Push, Pull, etc).
Consider that your tookit might have a more specific implementation available. Try to look for [your toolkit name]ActionConfig.

SAPMarkupFile.description: Set the location of the Bluebeam SAP XML markup file. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

ExcelFile.description: Set the location of the Excel schedules definitions file. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

BluebeamConfig.description: Set the Bluebeam configuration options to define how information should be pulled from the Bluebeam SAP XML markups. BluebeamConfig: Set up configuration settings for pulling from Bluebeam SAP markups.

HeatingFileDirectory.description: Set the directory where heating file template XMLs can be found.

FloorDefinitionsRequest.description: Provide the location within the Excel schedules definitions files for pulling Floor Schedule information. CellContentsRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

RoofDefinitionsRequest.description: Provide the location within the Excel schedules definitions files for pulling Roof Schedule information. CellContentsRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

WallDefinitionsRequest.description: Provide the location within the Excel schedules definitions files for pulling Wall Schedule information. CellContentsRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

PsiValuesRequest.description: Provide the location within the Excel schedules definitions files for pulling PSI Value information. CellContentsRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

OpeningDefinitionsRequest.description: Provide the location within the Excel schedules definitions files for pulling Opening Schedule information. CellContentsRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

OpeningPsiValuesRequest.description: Provide the location within the Excel schedules definitions files for pulling Opening PSI Value information. CellContentsRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

DwellingSchedulesRequest.description: Provide the location within the Excel schedules definitions files for pulling Dwelling Schedule information. CellContentsRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

WrapNonBHoMObjects.description: If true, the Push action wraps any non-BHoM type into a BH.oM.Adapter.ObjectWrapper, allowing them to make use of the full Adapter workflow.

AllowHashForComparing.description: If true and if no specific EqualityComparer is found for the type, Diffing hashes are computed and used to compare the objects.

DiffingConfig.description: Configurations for the Diffing hashing. Requires `AllowHashForComparing` to be set to true. DiffingConfig: General configurations for the Diffing process, including settings for the Hash computation.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
